title: conversion to varchar terminates mserver
poc:
CREATE TABLE config
   (id SERIAL
   ,dataset INT NOT NULL
   ,section VARCHAR(100)
   ,key VARCHAR(100)
   ,value VARCHAR(500)
   ,type VARCHAR(5)
   ,UNIQUE (dataset, section, key)
   )
 ;
INSERT INTO config (dataset, section, key, value, type) VALUES (6, 'quality_lofar', 'low_bound', 1.9, 'float');
INSERT INTO config (dataset, section, key, value, type) VALUES (6, 'quality_lofar', 'high_bound', 80, 'int');
key_bug_features: conversion of numeric types to varchar
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL, num_value INT, str_value VARCHAR(100), float_value FLOAT, unique_key VARCHAR(50), PRIMARY KEY (id));
INSERT INTO test_table (num_value, str_value, float_value, unique_key) VALUES (NULL, 'test1', 3.14, 'key1');
INSERT INTO test_table (num_value, str_value, float_value, unique_key) VALUES (100, 'test2', NULL, 'key2');
INSERT INTO test_table (num_value, str_value, float_value, unique_key) VALUES (2147483647, 'test3', 1.5, 'key3');
SELECT str_value, float_value FROM test_table WHERE num_value = 100 OR str_value IS NULL;
